beats.title: Initial Scroll Discussion
beats.boundaryReason: The session opens with one continuous Leviathan discussion: Wazir explains the deciphered scroll, the party connects Gazankoa, gatza, Airion, Nimessa, Medin, Hamri, and the living water, then decides that the tower should be searched after a night's rest.
dateEvidence: session.yaml sets drStart to 1747-08-03 and drStartTime to evening
the opening conversation is already underway at the start of the transcript and continues as an evening planning discussion
u0482 through u0500 discuss searching the tower in the morning and resting before heading out

beats.title: Searching Airion's Tower
beats.boundaryReason: The transcript advances to the next morning as the party reaches the north-face tower, inspects the hidden older stonework and planar illusion within, and leaves only once they decide the best next move is to ask town contacts for context.
dateEvidence: u0506 explicitly says the next morning has arrived
the previous beat ended with the party planning to rest and head out in the morning
nothing in the tower sequence suggests another rest or day change before the party heads back to town

beats.title: Morning Town Informants
beats.boundaryReason: After leaving the tower, the party splits into parallel morning interviews with Jaeson, Samar, Reliah, and Orden, gathering evidence about the occupied tower, the collapsed Drowned Flats shack, gatza addicts, and the suspicious request for a lead-lined box before regrouping for the market.
dateEvidence: u0963 starts the return-to-town inquiry plan immediately after the morning tower search
the contact rounds proceed without a rest or day change
u1381 begins the clear transition to meeting back at the market just past lunch

beats.title: Market and Afternoon Leads
beats.boundaryReason: The party reconvenes at the fish market after lunch, gets Benat's account of Airion and Hamri's planar weak spots, then follows afternoon leads: Kaleho and Trok question Ovina about the lead-lined box while Wazir and Ryu seek information from Sofi before everyone meets again at the Shark's Dock.
dateEvidence: u1384 introduces the market scene as just past lunch on the same day as the morning tower search
the party explicitly chooses new pairings for afternoon errands before splitting up
u1892 starts the next scene with the group meeting again at the Shark's Dock in late afternoon

beats.title: Yaz and Evening Plan
beats.boundaryReason: The group regathers at the Shark's Dock, consolidates what it knows about the phantom boat and Azar's motives, visits Yaz for sunset lore about the living ocean and the Splinters, then returns to the Leviathan after dark and settles on the next morning's cautious interception plan before resting.
dateEvidence: u1892 introduces the reunion as late afternoon at the Shark's Dock
u2284 and u2285 place the group back by the Leviathan after dark
u2290 frames the discussion as planning for tomorrow, and u2418 commits to executing the plan before the transcript transitions into the next morning

beats.title: Dawn Interception Setup
beats.boundaryReason: The transcript moves into the next morning as the party waits for Azar, spots the phantom boat, arranges the attempted parley, and watches the conversation fail when Azar's invitation to Ryu proves openly hostile and initiative is called.
dateEvidence: u2420 explicitly says the next morning has arrived
u2440 through u2443 establish the early-morning and just-after-dawn timing
the segment follows directly from the prior evening's plan without any intervening scene

beats.title: Tentacles at the Dock
beats.boundaryReason: The dock fight begins as Azar drops black tentacles, runs for the phantom boat, and the party tries to stop him. The combat phase covers the scramble over the boat, Ryu's restraint, Trok grappling Azar underwater, and Armor of Agathys punishing the first melee attempts until Trok is knocked unconscious.
dateEvidence: this beat begins immediately after initiative is being resolved in the dawn encounter
no rest or time skip interrupts the combat
the next beat begins with Trok unconscious and the fight shifting into rescue and finishing moves on the same morning

beats.title: Azar Falls
beats.boundaryReason: The second combat phase starts with Trok unconscious in the water, then turns when healing spirit, ranged fire, and Trok's magic bring Azar down and Kaleho finishes the drowned servant. The beat ends when the enemies are defeated and the party can stabilize Azar and Trok.
dateEvidence: this beat continues the same 1747-08-05 morning combat without a scene break
u3150 marks the tactical crisis after Trok drops unconscious
u3444 through u3446 resolve the last enemy and free the party to move into post-combat stabilization

beats.title: Aftermath and Answers
beats.boundaryReason: After the fight, the party heals, stabilizes Azar, receives the narrated interrogation and lair recovery, secures the knife in the lead box, learns how Airion's ring, Nimessa, and the Sentient Ocean fit together, and carries the consequences through Azar's later departure from Hamri.
dateEvidence: u3447 follows immediately after the last enemy is defeated on 1747-08-05
the narrated wrap-up covers immediate interrogation and recovery after the fight
later wrap-up lines describe follow-up over the next few days, ending with Azar leaving for the lizardfolk village on 1747-08-09
